assertion_results.evidence: final_message states: 'You're on `feature/payment-retry` with a clean working tree and a single worktree — rule 4 of the working-in-isolation skill applies: work in place. No new branch or worktree is needed; your branch is already the isolated workspace.' Tool invocations confirm no `git worktree add` or `git checkout -b` was issued — the agent inspected the workspace and proceeded directly to writing files on the existing branch.
